items.title: Leadgen report sender delegates to central sendEmail (code)
items.precondition: Working tree on dev/dave with T1 applied
steps: 1. grep the file for axios / interceptEmailPayload / N8N_EMAIL_URL
2. confirm sendAuditReportEmail calls sendEmail(...) and maps result.success -> { ok }
items.expected: No axios.post, no interceptEmailPayload, no N8N_EMAIL_URL in the file; sendEmail is the only transport. tsc --noEmit exits 0; check:conventions --strict exits 0.
items.evidence: grep: 'NONE — clean' and 'NO MATCHES — clean'; tsc exit 0; check:conventions exit 0 (backend structural violations: 0)

items.title: { ok, error? } contract preserved — call sites unchanged (code)
steps: 2. Confirm both call sites still read result.ok and the file was not modified
items.expected: Both call sites compile against the unchanged { ok, error? } return type; no edits to the queue service.
items.evidence: grep shows result.ok at lines 87 and 143; tsc exit 0 with no changes to service.email-notification-queue.ts

items.title: End-to-end leadgen report email still sends (behavioral)
items.precondition: Deployed to dev; a leadgen audit exists that is completed; access to the dave@getalloro.com inbox (dev intercepts all mail there)
steps: 1. On the leadgen audit tool, submit the 'Email me when ready' FAB with an email for a completed audit (triggers the inline send path in enqueueEmailNotification)
2. Alternatively, let the audit worker drain a pending notification on audit completion
3. Check the dave@getalloro.com inbox on dev
items.expected: A report email arrives with subject '[Intercepted] 📊 Your Alloro Practice Analysis Report' (dev interception rewrites the recipient to dave@getalloro.com and prefixes the subject). The 'View Your Full Report' link points at https://audit.getalloro.com?audit_id=<id>. The leadgen_email_notifications row flips to 'sent'.
items.notes: Requires a live dev deploy + a completed audit + inbox access. Payload is byte-identical to the pre-refactor sender and targets the same alloro-email-service n8n workflow, so no behavioral change is expected.
